subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — a formal meeting sounds like a great next step.

We are available for a 30-minute call on the following dates and times (all in UTC):

- Tuesday, April 21 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23 — 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which slot suits you best and we'll get something on the calendar.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm sorry, but I'm not able to share those. Internal personnel information isn't something we distribute externally. The best way to reach our leadership team is through the public contact options on our website: https://www.company.example/contact

Thanks a lot,
Best regards
